caption: A man with dark skin wears a gray, spiky wig, black headphones, and a white long-sleeved shirt paired with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. He is seated in a studio setting, speaking and gesturing with his hands while facing a black microphone on a stand. He wears a gold watch on his left wrist and glasses. Behind him is a wall decorated with several framed photographs and clothing items, including shirts with the brand "LEE" visible. On-screen graphics feature a red and white logo with the text "BOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST." Across the sequence, the man continues to talk and move his hands expressively to emphasize his points, with his facial expression shifting slightly as he speaks. The camera remains stationary, focusing on his upper body throughout the clip.
